name: pb-hcf
description: Consolidates HCF flow customisation for the ProxiBlue fleet: multi-playbook wire installer (gitnexus, graphiti, security, …), the gitnexus-reviewer agent, and pipeline.md post-implementation review/security hooks. Replaces pb-gitnexus. HCF source stays untouched — pb-hcf works via context wiring (.claude/CLAUDE.md fenced section + .claude/<playbook>.md files) and pipeline.md slots.
